name: section_subheading
label: Section Subheading
default: Our AI pipeline ingests any OpenAPI spec and ships a production connector — tested, documented, and marketplace-ready.

default.title: Spec Ingestion
default.description: Agents ingest the OpenAPI spec, analyze every endpoint, authentication method, and data schema.

default.title: Connector Generation
default.description: Production-grade connector generated with error handling, retry logic, auth flows, and per-endpoint type safety.

default.title: Smoke Testing
default.description: Per-endpoint smoke tests auto-generated. Automated validation before production deployment.

default.title: Workflow Nodes
default.description: Each connector automatically appears as its own node in the visual workflow builder — drag, drop, and chain across 22 node types.

default.title: Quality Audit
default.description: Multi-stage quality checks: schema validation, auth verification, and response mapping — 0 failures across 318 builds.

default.title: Marketplace Listing
default.description: Published to the searchable marketplace with logos, docs, and one-click activation for any operator.
